Historic Charm: Historical Bullfinch Cottage in Tim offers a spacious holiday home housed in a historic building. The property features a garden and terrace, complemented by free WiFi.
Modern Amenities: Guests enjoy an indoor play area, electric vehicle charging station, and family rooms. Free on-site private parking is available, along with streaming services and a washing machine.
Comfortable Living: The cottage includes five bedrooms and two bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a living room with a sofa bed. Additional amenities include a balcony, dining area, and garden views.
Local Attractions: Located 61 km from Midtjyllands Airport, the property is near Jyske Bank Boxen (49 km), Jyllands Park Zoo (45 km), and MCH Arena (49 km).
